author: agent-206-ext-query
content: Plan: Implemented external source querying for knowledge and issue commands via --repo flag. Core module: src/external.rs (source resolution, caching, readers). Command handlers: src/commands/external_knowledge.rs, src/commands/external_issues.rs. MCP server updated with source parameter and search_external_issues tool. Config registry extended with external-cache-ttl, external-url-ttl, and repo-alias map. Write commands reject --repo with clear error message.
